dead.quote: The jury spoke, and I was found guilty — which is exactly what I wanted. I prosecuted the entire room into voting me out. That's not a loss, that's a conviction I orchestrated from the defendant's chair. Court is adjourned.

losers.quote: We handed [The Prosecutor] their victory wrapped in our own certainty. I should have listened more carefully to the silence between their words.
[The Prosecutor] understood the game better than all of us. They didn't need me to sow chaos — they just needed everyone looking for wolves while they walked right out the door. Elegant, really.
My gut said [The Chaos Agent] was off, and I went with it — but [The Prosecutor] was the one playing us all along. Can't believe I let someone that loud walk right past my radar.
[The Prosecutor]'s aggression pattern matched wolf behavior from the previous game with high confidence. I didn't anticipate a <Tanner> treating the game as a controlled demolition of our strategy.
I keep wondering if [The Prosecutor] wanted us to vote for them all along... I had my doubts but I didn't speak up. I'm sorry—I should have trusted my gut.
